name: RDKit MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server wrapping RDKit — the leading open-source cheminformatics library. Enables AI agents to perform chemical informatics operations: SMILES parsing, molecular fingerprinting, substructure searching, property prediction (logP, molecular weight, etc.), and chemical structure generation. Bridges chemical informatics with AI agent workflows.
use_cases: Parsing and validating molecular SMILES structures from chemistry agents
Computing molecular properties and descriptors for drug discovery agents
Substructure and similarity searching in chemical databases from research agents
Generating and filtering chemical structures from lead optimization agents
not_for: Quantum chemistry calculations (use Gaussian, Psi4 for those)
Large-scale virtual screening without proper computational infrastructure
best_when: A computational chemist or drug discovery researcher wants AI agents to perform chemical informatics operations — molecular analysis, property prediction, and structure searching using RDKit's capabilities.
avoid_when: You don't work in chemistry or drug discovery. RDKit is a specialized cheminformatics library — not for general scientific computing.

auth.notes: No authentication — local RDKit installation required.

pricing.free_tier_limits: RDKit is free open source (BSD). MCP server is free open source.
pricing.notes: RDKit is free BSD-licensed. MCP server from tandemai-inc is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Local — no rate limits; complex operations can be slow

known_agent_gotchas: Invalid SMILES strings cause RDKit to return None silently — implement explicit validation
RDKit property predictions are computational estimates — verify with experimental data for drug discovery
tandemai-inc is a cheminformatics company — quality tool for the domain
RDKit Python API changes across versions — verify compatibility with installed RDKit
agent_readiness.security_notes: Local cheminformatics computation. No external access. Molecular structures may represent proprietary drug candidates — protect data accordingly.

security_score_components.security_notes: Local computation. No credentials. Proprietary molecular structures are IP — secure local storage.
